title: Regulations relating to fees payable to the Bank of Namibia, 2023
title_en: Regulations relating to fees payable to the Bank of Namibia, 2023

provisions.title: Definitions
provisions.content: In these regulations a word or an expression to which a meaning has been assigned in the Act has that meaning, and unless the context indicates otherwise- “ the Act ” means the Payment System Management Act, 2023 (Act No. 14 of 2023 ).

provisions.title: Fees payable for non-refundable application fees
provisions.content: A person who wishes to apply for a licence under section 10(1) of the Act or authorisation under section 11(3) of the Act must pay the following non-refundable fees to the Bank: (a) N$5000 for an application for a payment service provider licence; and (b) N$5000 for an application for authorisation as a payment system operator.

provisions.title: Methods of payment
provisions.content: (1) The fees payable as set out in regulation 2 must be paid to the Bank by transfer into a bank account nominated by the Bank in writing from time to time. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
